Skip to contents
qviewparsR 0.1.9
    • Reference
    • Changelog

    Package index

    Reader

    Parse a Q-View binary project file, or its flat report exports.

    read_qview() experimental
    Read a .Q-View project file
    read_qview_report() experimental
    Read a Q-View report export (CSV or XLSX)

    Helpers

    Naming convention and plate-coordinate utilities.

    strip_qview_prefix() experimental
    Reverse the Q-View internal naming convention
    well_label() experimental
    Convert plate row / column to a well label
    read_qview_template() experimental
    Read a Q-View well-assignment template CSV

    Methods

    Print, summarise, plot, and coerce a parsed qview object.

    is_qview() experimental
    Test whether an object is a qview
    print(<qview>)
    Print a Q-View object
    print(<qview_summary>) experimental
    Print a qview_summary object
    summary(<qview>)
    Summary statistics for a Q-View object
    plot(<qview>)
    Plot a Q-View object
    as_tibble(<qview>)
    Coerce a Q-View object to a tibble

    Export

    Write a parsed qview object to disk.

    write_qview_xlsx() write_qview_csv() write_qview_rds() qview_to_xlsx() qview_to_csv_dir() experimental
    Write a Q-View object to disk

    Shiny app

    Upload, preview, visualise, and download a .Q-View file.

    qview_app() experimental
    Launch the qviewparsR Q-View Shiny app

    Package

    qviewparsR qviewparsR-package experimental
    qviewparsR: Read .Q-View Multiplex ELISA Project Files

    On this page

    Developed by R. Heller, M. Mannes.

    qviewparsR is part of the CTTIR suite · GitHub
